creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #3)
I put the changelog in the opening comment
for this pr(1), as it appears in the source hierarchy:

snd-22.9/NEWS:
Snd 22.8

s7: s7_number_to_real_with_location. s7_wrong_type_error. 
    s7_make_string_wrapper_with_length. s7_make_semipermanent_string.
    CL-style doc strings, (symbol...) settable.

checked: sbcl 2.2.9

Thjat is all that's available.

Thanks.
